name: BatFamily- Christmas
description:
Spending the 12 days leading up to Christmas with the Bat-Family/Wayne Family. Getting to help decorate, snowball fight and doing all the festive things with them. Christmas eve and Christmas day fun hi-jinks and gift giving.

I got a Discord where you can check out my postings, artwork and AI works and make request.
